result.markdown:
---
title: "PERMANOVA family beta diversity by study group"
description: "Bray–Curtis dissimilarity on family relative abundance; study-group effect tested with permutational MANOVA."
date: 2026-05-19
categories: [permanova, beta-diversity, family, pre-specified]
author: "IBD Capstone team"
---

## Research question

Does **study group** explain differences in **family-level** community composition?

**Null:** Multivariate centroids do not differ among study groups (PERMANOVA on Bray–Curtis distances).

## Data

- **Response:** Family relative abundance (`f__*` columns after wide reshape).
- **Predictor:** `Study_group_new`.
- **Input:** `data/processed/family.csv` (long format from `make save`; pivoted in this post).

## Methods

| Item | Choice |
|------|--------|
| Test | PERMANOVA (`vegan::adonis2`) |
| Distance | Bray–Curtis |
| Formula | `dist ~ Study_group_new` |
| Permutations | 999 |
| Visualization | PCoA (`cmdscale`, k = 2), 95% ellipses |



## Results


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}


|Term     | Df| Sum of squares|     R²|      F| Pr(>F)|
|:--------|--:|--------------:|------:|------:|------:|
|Model    |  2|         0.2018| 0.1166| 0.8583|  0.708|
|Residual | 13|         1.5284| 0.8834|     NA|     NA|
|Total    | 15|         1.7302| 1.0000|     NA|     NA|


:::
:::


**Study group** explained **11.7%** of variance in Family composition (R² = 0.117; pseudo-F = 0.86; p = 0.7080, 999 permutations).

## Figure


::: {.cell layout-align="center"}

```{.r .cell-code}
plot_pcoa_study_group(
  fit$dist,
  fit$metadata,
  permanova_result,
  cfg$label
)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![PCoA of family Bray–Curtis dissimilarity by study group.](index_files/figure-html/fig-pcoa-1.png){#fig-pcoa fig-align='center' width=672}
:::
:::




## Reproducibility

- **Helpers:** `stats/R/permanova_helpers.R`
- **Pipeline:** `make wrangle` → `make save`
